title: Treasure After the Bell
description: The Straw Hats leave Skypiea behind, carrying treasure, memories, and the sound of the golden bell back toward the Blue Sea.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this scene focuses on Luffy, Nami, Zoro, Usopp, Sanji. The Straw Hats leave Skypiea behind, carrying treasure, memories, and the sound of the golden bell back toward the Blue Sea.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What...? They ran off from the island?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That their savours ran out on them...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I want to become like him too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: And have my body stretch reeeeeaaaally long!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: No longer need to bear arms...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Has likely reached your dear friend...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: But we will not lose our pride!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: To never let the flame of Shandora,

summary: The Straw Hats leave Skypiea behind, carrying treasure, memories, and the sound of the golden bell back toward the Blue Sea.
